codeReview.summary: Original feature implemented Inngest cron job with console logging only. Two fix features (m3-3-fix-low-stock-notifications and m3-3-fix-duplicate-alert-tracking) adequately address the original failures by adding WhatsApp integration via EvolutionService and duplicate alert tracking via a new database table.

fixFeaturesReviewed.summary: Implemented actual WhatsApp notifications by integrating with EvolutionService. Gets profile's WhatsApp number from profile table, checks for active WhatsApp config (enabled + connected), and sends formatted message. Gracefully handles missing configuration by logging and continuing to next profile.

Added duplicate alert tracking with new low_stock_alert_sent table. Implements check/record/clear pattern: checks existing alerts before sending to avoid duplicates, records alerts after sending, and clears tracking when stock is replenished (above minStock). Both scheduled cron and manual test functions updated.

summary: The original low stock alerts job (m3-3-low-stock-alerts-job) implemented the Inngest cron job but only logged to console. Two fix features adequately address the blocking issues: (1) m3-3-fix-low-stock-notifications adds actual WhatsApp integration via EvolutionService, and (2) m3-3-fix-duplicate-alert-tracking adds a tracking table and logic to prevent duplicate alerts. Both fixes are properly implemented and integrated into the main function.
